headline: Iran threatens war over US base attacks as Israel strikes Hezbollah operative
subheadline: Iranian officials denounced strikes on Bahrain and Kuwait bases, warning war if US fails to honor MoU, while Israel killed a Hezbollah target in Lebanon.
lede: Iran condemned recent attacks on U.S. installations in Bahrain and Kuwait, labeling them cease‑fire violations and warning of possible war if commitments are not met. Israel's military reported killing a Hezbollah operative near Manzleh in southern Lebanon, describing the target as a threat to Israeli forces. In Kyiv, Ukraine fielded new Banderol and Dan cruise missiles with 500 km range, expanding its strike capability. Russian Shahed UAVs continued to swarm central Ukrainian regions, prompting heavy air‑defence activity.

sections.title: Ukraine Deploys New Long‑Range Cruise Missiles
sections.body: Ukraine announced the deployment of Banderol and Dan cruise missiles, each carrying a 150 kg warhead and capable of striking targets up to 500 km away. Russian Shahed UAVs intensified attacks near Kirovohrad, Dnipropetrovsk, and Chernihiv, while over 50 Ukrainian drones were shot down during a night raid on the Moscow approach. Ukrainian forces reported destroying enemy personnel and equipment near Novoivanivka using newly fielded 'drone‑watcher' systems.

sections.title: Iran‑US Tensions Rise After Gulf Base Attacks
sections.body: Iranian officials condemned the attacks on U.S. bases in Bahrain and Kuwait, calling them cease‑fire violations and warning of war if the U.S. does not honor the Iran‑US MoU. Israel's military killed a Hezbollah operative near Manzleh in southern Lebanon and arrested a U.S. citizen in Jerusalem on suspicion of spying for Iran. Hundreds of thousands of residents are returning to southern Lebanon amid a reported lull, but Hezbollah killings and Israeli statements keep the border highly volatile.

sections.title: Intelligence Assessment
sections.body: The data shows a coordinated escalation: Iran signals willingness to resume hostilities while Israel intensifies targeted strikes, creating multiple flashpoints. Ukraine's new cruise missiles and Russia's persistent UAV and bomber sorties indicate a widening operational reach on both sides, raising the risk of broader regional spillover.
